---
title: "Photo Gallery"
description: "A more personal glimpse"
format: html
---

<span class="eyebrow">Plates · A personal album</span>

<p class="lede">A more personal glimpse of my life through pictures that reflect my passions, my academic collaborations, and above all, the people I care about.</p>

---

## Family

<div class="gallery-grid">
<a href="photos/family1.jpg" data-lightbox="family"><img src="photos/family1.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/family2.jpg" data-lightbox="family"><img src="photos/family2.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/family3.jpg" data-lightbox="family"><img src="photos/family3.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/family4.jpg" data-lightbox="family"><img src="photos/family4.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/family5.jpg" data-lightbox="family"><img src="photos/family5.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/family6.jpg" data-lightbox="family"><img src="photos/family6.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/lorenzo.jpg" data-lightbox="family"><img src="photos/lorenzo.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/vittoria.jpg" data-lightbox="family"><img src="photos/vittoria.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/family7.jpg" data-lightbox="family"><img src="photos/family7.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/family8.jpg" data-lightbox="family"><img src="photos/family8.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/family9.jpg" data-lightbox="family"><img src="photos/family9.jpg" alt=""></a>
</div>

---

## Friends

<div class="gallery-grid">
<a href="photos/friends1.jpg" data-lightbox="friends"><img src="photos/friends1.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/friends2.jpg" data-lightbox="friends"><img src="photos/friends2.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/friends3.jpg" data-lightbox="friends"><img src="photos/friends3.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/friends4.jpg" data-lightbox="friends"><img src="photos/friends4.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/friends5.jpg" data-lightbox="friends"><img src="photos/friends5.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/friends6.jpg" data-lightbox="friends"><img src="photos/friends6.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/friends7.jpg" data-lightbox="friends"><img src="photos/friends7.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/friends8.jpg" data-lightbox="friends"><img src="photos/friends8.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/friends9.jpg" data-lightbox="friends"><img src="photos/friends9.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/friends10.jpg" data-lightbox="friends"><img src="photos/friends10.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/friends11.jpg" data-lightbox="friends"><img src="photos/friends11.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/friends12.jpg" data-lightbox="friends"><img src="photos/friends12.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/friends13.jpg" data-lightbox="friends"><img src="photos/friends13.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/friends14.jpg" data-lightbox="friends"><img src="photos/friends14.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/friends15.jpg" data-lightbox="friends"><img src="photos/friends15.jpg" alt=""></a>
</div>

---

## Work

<div class="gallery-grid">
<a href="photos/work1.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work1.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work2.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work2.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work3.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work3.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work4.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work4.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work5.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work5.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work6.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work6.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work7.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work7.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work8.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work8.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work9.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work9.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work22.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work22.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work23.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work23.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work10.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work10.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work11.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work11.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work12.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work12.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work13.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work13.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work14.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work14.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work15.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work15.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work16.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work16.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work17.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work17.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work18.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work18.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work19.PNG" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work19.PNG" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work20.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work20.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work21.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work21.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work24.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work24.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work25.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work25.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work26.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work26.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work27.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work27.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work28.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work28.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work29.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work29.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work30.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work30.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work31.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work31.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work32.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work32.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work33.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work33.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work34.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work34.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="photos/work35.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="photos/work35.jpg" alt=""></a>
</div>
